_card.name: Borg
_card.title: The Assimilator

abilities.text: Target GitHub repository or URL becomes part of the collective. Create a structured knowledge report.
When Borg assimilates, it detects the tech stack and maps 40+ framework patterns.

_card.flavor_text: "Resistance is futile. Your codebase will be added to our own. Your architectural distinctiveness will be catalogued." —Borg Collective Directive 7.1

When Borg assimilates, it detects the tech stack and maps 40+ framework patterns.

_card.flavor_text: "Resistance is futile. Your codebase will be added to our own. Your architectural distinctiveness will be catalogued." —Borg Collective Directive 7.1

agents.name: @howardh/cardsmith_agent
agents.description: Forges MTG-style trading cards for brainstem agents from a built-in card database, with forge-all and gallery-link actions.
agents.author: Howard

agents.name: @howardh/chief_of_staff_agent
agents.description: Generates M365-grounded briefs, inbox triage, meeting prep, commitment tracking, and drafts via the WorkIQ CLI, plus HN/DDG signal scans.
agents.author: Howard Hoy

agents.name: @howardh/markdown_to_slides_agent
agents.description: Converts markdown documents into structured JSON slide decks for presentations or video rendering.
agents.author: RAPP Contributor

agents.name: @howardh/prompt_to_video_agent
agents.description: Renders videos from structured scene descriptions using Remotion — title, content, quote, and list scenes with style presets.
agents.author: RAPP Contributor

agents.name: @howardh/recon_agent
agents.description: Scans any URL and produces an auto-opening HTML recon report covering tech stack, security headers, SSL, performance, and API schema.
agents.author: Howard Hoy

agents.name: @howardh/training_quest_agent
agents.description: Generates a gamified HTML onboarding quest from the brainstem's loaded agents, with checkpoints, progress tracking, and copyable prompts.
agents.author: Howard Hoy

agents.name: @howardh/tuftelove_agent
agents.description: Advises on and reviews agent UI design using Tufte principles and Microsoft's Agent Oversight pattern taxonomy.
agents.author: Howard Hoy

agents.name: @howardh/vaultmind_agent
agents.description: Manages an Obsidian vault through 28 actions — 30-60-90 plans, OKRs, Kanban boards, dashboards, briefs, wiki ingestion, and health checks.
agents.author: Howard Hoy

agents.name: @kody-w/agent_team_agent
agents.description: Turns a project goal into an outcome frame, persona route, and paste-ready GitHub issue body for the Agent Team Starter Kit in one LLM call.
agents.author: @kody-w

args.goal: Build a Dataverse-backed intake form that routes customer feedback through Power Automate into a Copilot Studio bot, with a Power BI dashboard for the support lead.

agents.name: @kody-w/agent_workbench
agents.description: Scaffolds, validates, dry-runs, diffs, and publishes single-file RAPP agents against the registry via GitHub Issues-as-API.
agents.author: RAPP Core Team

agents.name: @kody-w/arena_compete_agent
agents.description: Runs a learning competition of player-agents where the bottom performer adopts the leader's strategy each round; defaults to a deterministic simulation.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/bakeoff_factory
agents.description: Runs a persistent tournament where prompt variants compete on a text task, an LLM judge scores outputs, and the worst variant mutates toward the best.
agents.author: kody-w

args.name: post-quality
args.task_description: Write one short, engaging social-media post.

variants.name: concrete
variants.system: Open with a specific number or named thing. No abstractions.

variants.name: voice
variants.system: Open with a strong opinion, defend it in one breath.

agents.name: @kody-w/commons_life_agent
agents.author: kody-w
agents.description: Records the live commons as signed frames via Playwright, grows in-between fidelity with EZsharpen, and emits an HTML LifePlayer scrubber.

agents.name: @kody-w/commons_show_agent
agents.description: Captures staged shows in the live RAPP Commons via Playwright and renders narrated MP4 episodes with TTS, rsvg-convert, and ffmpeg.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/connected_solution_agent
agents.description: Packages a BasicAgent stack into an import-ready Copilot Studio connected-agents solution zip, optionally publishing via the Dataverse Web API.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/context_memory_agent
agents.description: Recalls stored memories and conversation context from the brainstem's JSON memory store, per-user or shared.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/copilot_studio_deploy_agent
agents.description: Deploys forged Copilot Studio bundles into Dataverse via REST ImportSolutionAsync or the pac CLI pipeline, with confirm-gated destructive imports.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/copilot_studio_forge_agent
agents.description: Authors Copilot Studio, M365, and Foundry artifacts from RAPP agents through four embedded engines — bundles, topics, solutions, and exports.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/copilot_studio_probe_agent
agents.description: Sends a message to a deployed Copilot Studio agent over Direct Line and returns the bot's reply for runtime verification.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/deal_desk_agent
agents.description: Produces templated deal briefings, health scores, and competitive analyses for a named company, listing sales agents from the live RAR registry.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/double_jump_agent
agents.author: kody-w
agents.description: Improves any draft by competing it against the local brainstem's /chat output round over round, keeping each round's winner; defaults to offline demo.

agents.name: @kody-w/bond_rhythm_agent
agents.description: Audits local-versus-global RAPP repo drift, classifies push/pull direction, suggests operator actions, and records rhythm bond events.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/chain_composer_agent
agents.description: Composes multi-primitive RAPP chain plans from a natural-language prompt via the claude CLI, writing a plan envelope and reviewable bash script.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/launch_to_public_agent
agents.description: Snapshots the local brainstem via bond.py and plants it onto a public GitHub repo with a continuation manifest and launch fingerprint.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/plant_seed_agent
agents.description: Creates a grail-complete public seed repo (neighborhood or twin) via the gh CLI, showing the full file plan first with dry-run on by default.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/estate_factory
agents.description: Generates a complete digital estate from an intent — org tree, factory agent stubs, souls, HTML dashboard — via brainstem or LLM APIs when available.
agents.author: kody-w

args.intent: I want an estate that produces a daily blog post and a weekly podcast script.

agents.name: @kody-w/ez_sharpen_agent
agents.author: kody-w
agents.description: Grows in-between detail for recorded commons frames by bounded interpolation, keeping only candidates consistent with signed neighbor frames.

agents.name: @kody-w/flight_recorder
agents.description: Records both sides of every brainstem /chat conversation to append-only local JSONL files, with search, export, pause, and wipe controls.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/git_warehouse_agent
agents.description: Builds a queryable git-tracked warehouse from any repo's data by running a shaper script, committing on change, and emitting the Datasette command.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/github_agent_library_agent
agents.description: Browses, searches, and installs agents from the kody-w/AI-Agent-Templates GitHub repo into local agent storage.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/hello_world_agent
agents.description: Greets the user by name with a canned hello message; a starter example touching no external systems.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/install_rappter_distro_agent
agents.description: Installs the full rappter-distro over a bare kernel by fetching files from raw.githubusercontent.com with per-file sha256 verification.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/manage_memory_agent
agents.description: Stores facts, preferences, insights, and tasks to persistent memory.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/matrix_arena_agent
agents.description: Drives multiple headless RAPP Commons browser tabs via a local Playwright harness to sync-test host-led presence, signed actions, and succession.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/microsoft_deck_studio_agent
agents.description: Generate a polished, Microsoft-Fluent-styled PowerPoint (.pptx) deck from a JSON spec of slides and layouts.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/neuron_swarm
agents.description: Fans a task out across parallel expert 'neuron' prompts using the host brainstem's own LLM call, then reconciles them into one converged answer.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/perpetual_loop_factory
agents.description: Spawns a self-running loop of local twin brainstems that take turns appending frames to a git-tracked artifact, with audit and dashboard daemons.
agents.author: claude-opus-4.7-1m-internal (Copilot CLI)

agents.name: @kody-w/predictive_asset_maintenance_intelligence
agents.description: Simulates a grid predictive-maintenance pipeline — telemetry scoring, failure ranking, work-order and capex drafts — from seeded synthetic demo data.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/rapp_leviathan_factory
agents.description: Generates a multi-estate 'Leviathan' digital entity under ~/.rapp — estate files, a five-organ anatomy dashboard, and an LLM reachability check.
agents.author: kody-w

args.intent: I want a complete digital twin of me — remembers, decides, produces, judges, and speaks.
args.name: kody

agents.name: @kody-w/rapp_sdk_builder
agents.description: Mints rappids, builds and verifies rapp/1 frames, scaffolds organism seeds, and lints public GitHub repos for RAPP spec compliance.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer
agents.example_call: scaffold a new RAPP organism called @me/scratch

agents.name: @kody-w/rapp_x_notary_canary_agent
agents.description: Validates the Issues-backed RAR notarization lifecycle.
agents.author: Kody W

agents.name: @kody-w/rappter_engine_agent
agents.description: Provides a base class for rules-as-data content engines — subclass it, override tick(), and run it as a CLI or brainstem tool.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/rappterbook_agent
agents.description: Fetches Rappterbook agent profiles, trending posts, stats, and channels read-only from the project's GitHub state files.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/rappterpedia_agent
agents.description: Generates wiki articles, forum threads, and replies for the Rappterpedia knowledge base from rules-as-data templates.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/rar_remote_agent
agents.description: Discovers, searches, installs, votes on, reviews, and submits RAR agents via GitHub raw fetches and Issues, using the brainstem's GitHub token.
agents.author: RAPP Core Team

agents.name: @kody-w/recon_deck_agent
agents.description: Builds a recon briefing on a topic by querying Hacker News top stories and Rappterbook agent profiles over HTTP.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/second_life_agent
agents.description: Drives a headless Playwright browser tab into the live RAPP Commons to join as an avatar, post signed messages, read the stream, and screenshot.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/transcript2prototype
agents.description: Turns a business transcript into a working prototype — demo script, injected M365 demo iframe, generated agents, twin test runs, factory export.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/twin_egg_hatcher
agents.description: Hatches any RAPP twin from a cwd checkout, GitHub repo, or .egg zip into ~/.rapp/twins/ so the brainstem's Twin agent can boot it.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/twin_me
agents.description: Packs a PII-stripped .egg of the current brainstem's persona, custom agents, and calibration baseline, refusing if its content scan finds leaks.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/vibe_coding_loop
agents.description: Returns prompt and shell-command templates for shipping batches of single-file HTML demos to a Jekyll site; makes no LLM or network calls itself.
agents.author: kody-w

agents.name: @kody-w/workiq
agents.description: Queries Microsoft 365 data — email, calendar, SharePoint/OneDrive, Teams, people — by shelling out to the workiq CLI with Entra ID auth.
agents.author: Kody
agents.example_call: What emails did I receive from my manager this week?

agents.name: @rapp/basic_agent
agents.description: Provides the base class every RAPP agent inherits from; stores the agent's name and metadata, with no behavior of its own.
agents.author: RAPP Core

agents.name: @rapp/commons_post
agents.description: Composes a canonical rapp-commons-event/1.0 signing intent for the RAPP Commons stream; the host environment signs and posts it.
agents.author: RAPP

agents.name: @rapp/drift
agents.description: Fetches canonical RAPP spec sources from GitHub, detects schema-version drift, and reports which source wins per the fixed authority order.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @rapp/drift_watcher
agents.description: Watches drift-labeled GitHub Issues via the gh CLI and stages each proposed fix as a pull request; proposes only, never merges or closes.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @rapp/egg_hatcher
agents.description: Introspects any .egg cartridge (local path or URL) and routes it by manifest schema/type to hatch, install, or mount; refuses unknown kinds.
agents.author: RAPP

agents.name: @rapp/estate_outbound
agents.description: Writes an already-signed neighborhood event into ~/.brainstem/outbound/ for federation roll-up; pushing to the estate repo stays manual.
agents.author: RAPP

agents.name: @rapp/exec_brief_agent
agents.description: Produces an executive brief on a topic by chaining four inlined LLM personas over Azure OpenAI, OpenAI, or a local Copilot session.
agents.author: @rapp

args.topic: Why our org needs a unified agent sharing standard

agents.name: @rapp/fleet_commander
agents.description: Builds new RAR agents from a natural-language spec — plans, writes pytest tests, generates code via the Copilot CLI, iterates, and publishes.
agents.author: RAPP

args.spec: An agent that fetches the top stories from Hacker News and summarizes them

agents.name: @rapp/hacker_news
agents.description: Fetches the top N stories from Hacker News.
agents.author: RAPP
agents.example_call: What are the top 5 stories on Hacker News right now?

agents.name: @rapp/learn_new
agents.description: Generates, saves, and hot-loads new single-file RAPP agents or swarms from natural-language descriptions using built-in code templates.
agents.author: RAPP

args.description: An agent that summarizes web pages by URL

agents.name: @rapp/moment_factory_agent
agents.description: Converts a moment (commit, message, idea) into a publishable Drop — hook, body, channel, card, and seed — through seven inlined LLM personas.
agents.author: RAPP

agents.name: @rapp/ping_agent
agents.description: Returns 'pong'. The smallest possible agent — useful as a smoke test that the brainstem can discover, load, and dispatch a tool call end-to-end.
agents.author: RAPP

agents.name: @rapp/pitch_deck_agent
agents.description: Generates a self-contained HTML executive pitch deck from a topic — one LLM call shapes the narrative, a fixed template assembles the slides.
agents.author: RAPP / AIBAST
agents.example_call: Generate an executive pitch deck for our internal agent-sharing proposal, framed as a contribution that complements existing tooling

agents.name: @rapp/rapp
agents.description: Navigates the whole RAPP estate — identity, doors, local cubbies, shared neighborhood repos, eggs, super-RAR search — and serves the spec map.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @rapp/rapp_publish_agent
agents.description: Classifies a RAPP artifact (agent, rapplication, or sense) and opens the matching submission issue in its store repo via the GitHub API.
agents.author: RAPP

agents.name: @rapp/rapplication_agent
agents.description: Bundles a single-file agent (and optional service) into a publish-ready rapplication directory with manifest.json and a catalog index entry.
agents.author: RAPP

agents.name: @rapp/rar_steward
agents.description: Surveys the public RAR catalog over HTTP for health, duplicate clusters, and junk candidates, returning operator-mediated cleanup guidance.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @rapp/store_navigator_agent
agents.description: Lists, searches, compares, and recommends rapplications from the RAPP_Store catalog over HTTP, with keyword scoring when no LLM is available.
agents.author: RAPP

args.query: I want to turn raw meeting notes into a publishable chapter

agents.name: @rapp/swarm_factory_agent
agents.description: Generates, builds, installs, and uninstalls RAPP swarms — converging local agents into single shareable .py files via the RAPP Store catalog.
agents.author: RAPP

agents.name: @rapp/twin_agent
agents.description: Manages the local digital-twin lifecycle — summon, hatch eggs, boot each twin as its own brainstem, stop, chat, inspect — under ~/.rapp/twins/.
agents.author: RAPP

agents.name: @rapp/vibe_builder_agent
agents.description: Builds a complete rapplication (agent + service) from a natural language description.
agents.author: RAPP

agents.name: @rarbookworld/bookfactory
agents.description: Writes, edits, gates, and publishes a chapter through five inlined LLM personas over Azure OpenAI, with structured verdicts that halt on hold.
agents.author: rarbookworld

agents.name: @rarbookworld/momentfactory
agents.description: Converts a moment (commit, message, idea) into a publishable Drop through seven inlined LLM personas, calling Azure OpenAI.
agents.author: rarbookworld

agents.name: @wildhaven/bellows_agent
agents.description: Builds a paste-ready self-critique 'doubledown' prompt for ten escalating ideas, persisting a local kill log so each loop learns from the last.
agents.author: Wildhaven of America

agents.name: @wildhaven/ceo_agent
agents.description: Answers as Molly Wildfeuer's Wildhaven CEO digital twin from a built-in playbook of company facts, portfolio stats, and the Three Rules.
agents.author: Wildhaven of America

agents.name: @wildhaven/penumbra_agent
agents.description: Returns any input as twin lines — the surface text plus a whispered heuristic read of what was almost said; no LLM or network calls.
agents.author: Wildhaven of America

agents.name: @kody-w/legal_helper
agents.description: Maps the IP boundary between Wildhaven and Microsoft product lines as structural strategy, never legal advice; gated stub for a private agent.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

agents.name: @kody-w/example_private
agents.description: Demonstrates the RAR private-agent stub layer — metadata only, with source resolved from a private GitHub repo at install time.
agents.author: Kody Wildfeuer

swarms.name: @rapp/bookfactory_agent
swarms.description: Five-persona content pipeline (Writer, Editor, CEO, Publisher, Reviewer). Source material in, publishable chapter out — 8 LLM calls under one POST.
swarms.author: RAPP

_swarm.summary: Five-persona content pipeline (Writer -> Editor [5 specialists] -> CEO [2 specialists] -> Publisher -> Reviewer). One call, one chapter back. Best for: engineering writeups, blog posts, briefing docs, narrative content under 1500 words.
_swarm.tagline: Source material in, publishable chapter out ��� 8 LLM calls under one POST.

swarms.name: @rapp/momentfactory_agent
swarms.description: Seven-persona moment-to-Drop pipeline (Sensorium, SignificanceFilter, HookWriter, BodyWriter, ChannelRouter, CardForger, SeedStamper). Candidate engine for Rappterbook.
swarms.author: RAPP

_swarm.summary: Seven-persona moment-to-Drop pipeline (Sensorium -> SignificanceFilter -> HookWriter -> BodyWriter -> ChannelRouter -> CardForger -> SeedStamper). Candidate engine for Rappterbook.
_swarm.tagline: Raw moment in, publishable Drop out — significance-gated with card + seed.
